title: session-bridge job
description: A unit of work an agent hands off to a connector. Drop as <queue>/inbox/<id>.job.json. Connector-specific fields beyond these are allowed and passed through untouched.

id.description: Unique, human-readable slug. Also the result filename.

channel.description: Which configured connector handles this job (e.g. email, chat).

action.description: Optional connector hint, e.g. reply | new.

to.description: Primary recipient/target, in whatever form the connector expects.

thread.description: Optional hint identifying an existing thread to reply into (e.g. sender + subject words).

body.description: The message content, written in the operator's voice (see prompts/STYLE.md). The connector owns final formatting/signature.

origin.description: Free label for where the job came from, echoed into the result.
